name: Old Hunter's Shack
description: A small, sturdy cabin built from thick logs. Smoke drifts from the chimney, and the smell of roasting meat wafts through the air.

discovery.message: You find a narrow trail that leads to a small, well-hidden cabin in a clearing.

shack-interior.text: The shack is warm and relatively clean. A heavy iron-bound trapdoor is tucked under a rug in the corner.

choices.label: Take a short rest by the fire.

rest-node.text: You spend some time resting. The warmth of the fire restores your spirit.

search-supplies.text: You rummage through the hunter's belongings.
search-supplies.success_text: You find a bundle of arrows and some dried meat.
search-supplies.failure_text: You find nothing but old furs and rusted traps.

search-success.text: The supplies will be useful on the road.

trapdoor-locked.text: The trapdoor is secured with a massive iron padlock. It matches the 'Heavy Iron Key' perfectly.

choices.label: [Athletics 22] Attempt to wrench the padlock off.

cellar-entry.text: The trapdoor creaks open, revealing a stone staircase leading down into a hidden cellar. Inside, you find the hunter's true treasure.
